title: Sample letters to get evidence of domestic abuse
body: "You need to provide 1 piece of written evidence of domestic abuse to get legal aid in a divorce or separation.  You can use any of these sample letters to ask for proof.  If you have a lawyer, they will be able to help you complete the letters and get the evidence.  Find out more about how to apply for legal aid.  If you’re a professional who works with victims of domestic abuse and have been asked to provide evidence for a legal aid application, please use the relevant sample letter below to reply. "
